title: Agent runners plugins catalog
description: Catalog of installable SideButton agent plugins. A plugin is a small package (plugin.json + handlers) that the SideButton MCP server loads from ~/.sidebutton/plugins/ and exposes as MCP tools. The install step base/19b-plugins.sh resolves a slug to its public git repo from this file and runs `sidebutton plugin install`. The portal vendors this file as the single source of truth for plugin display metadata; agent-runners is the source of truth.

version.description: Manifest format version. Bump when the shape of an entry changes in a non-additive way.

slug.description: Stable id used in profiles[].default_plugins, the provision API plugins[] override, and the SIDEBUTTON_PLUGINS install env. Matches the plugin.json `name` of the installed plugin.

name.description: Display name shown on the fleet list + agent detail.

description.description: One-line description shown in the agent detail plugins section.

repo.description: Public GitHub repo (owner/name) the install step clones anonymously.

ref.description: Branch or tag to clone. Defaults to 'main' when omitted.

submodules.description: Clone with --recurse-submodules (e.g. writing-quality vendors humanizer + stop-slop). Defaults to false.

system_deps.description: apt packages the plugin needs at runtime (e.g. ['ffmpeg'] for screen-record). Installed as root before the plugin copy. Defaults to [].
